basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Teaching Faculty/ Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Associate Professor / Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 23-05-2026 on the official website www.esic.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Associate Professor / Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.esic.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the ESIC Associate Professor / Senior Resident posts is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ESIC Associate Professor / Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Associate Professor and Senior Resident positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the organization releasing this notification?
faq.answer: The Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) is releasing this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this ESIC recruitment is 04/2026.

faq.question: Q6. Which city are these ESIC posts located in?
faq.answer: The ESIC posts are located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these ESIC positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contract.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for ESIC Associate Professor / Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official website of ESIC?
faq.answer: The official website of ESIC is www.esic.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any application fees mentioned for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this ESIC recruitment.
